zh.lifeSummary: Richardus Holmes於大約1579年出生在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德。他於1603年1月30日與Margreta Haynes在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1626年5月24日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richardus Holmes于大约1579年出生在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德。他于1603年1月30日与Margreta Haynes在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1626年5月24日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Holmes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: either from the plural form of Holme , or else a variant of Holme or Home , with excrescent -s (see Holm ).

Scottish: probably a habitational name from Holmes near Dundonald (Ayrshire), or possibly from another place so called in the barony of Inchestuir (Angus). Both placenames likely derive from the plural form of Middle English, Older Scots holm ‘islet, raised land in a marsh’ (see Holm ).

Scottish and Irish: adopted for Scottish Gaelic and Irish Mac Thómais, Mac Thómais (see McComb ). In parts of western Ireland, Holmes is also a variant of Cavish, from Gaelic Mac Thámhais, another patronymic from Thomas . Early bearers in Ireland were probably immigrants from Scotland.

variants.name: Holme
meanings: English (northwestern England): variant of   Holm   and of   Home   3 and 4.
Danish and Swedish: variant of   Holm   1.

variants.name: Homes
meanings: English: variant of   Holmes   and   Home  .

nameMeanings.name: Richardus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Richard , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Rickards .
German: patronymic from the personal name   Richard  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Richardus Holmes was born about 1579, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England. He married Margreta Haynes on 30 January 1603, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died before 24 May 1626, in his hometown, and was buried in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Richardus Holmes est né environ 1579, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Margreta Haynes le 30 janvier 1603, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 24 mai 1626, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Richardus Holmes wurde um 1579 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England geboren. Er hat am 30. Januar 1603 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Margreta Haynes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 24. Mai 1626 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Richardus Holmes è nato il circa 1579 nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England. Lui sposato Margreta Haynes il 30 gennaio 1603, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì prima del 24 maggio 1626, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richardus Holmesは約1579年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで生まれた。1603年1月30日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドでMargreta Haynesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1626年5月24日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richardus Holmes(은)는 대략 1579년 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에서 태어났다. 그는 1603년 1월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 Margreta Haynes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1626년 5월 24일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richardus Holmes nasceu aproximadamente 1579, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Margreta Haynes em 30 de janeiro de 1603, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 24 de maio de 1626, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Richardus Holmes родился около 1579 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Margreta Haynes 30 января 1603 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер перед 24 май 1626 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Richardus Holmes nació aproximadamente 1579, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Margreta Haynes el 30 de enero de 1603, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió antes de 24 de mayo de 1626, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
